title: The Stunning White Terraces of Pamukkale

segments.text: These terraces look like a cascade of snow.
You'll find it in Denizli Province, Turkey.
It's formed by mineral-rich hot springs flowing over white limestone.
A natural wonder with healing thermal waters.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Pamukkale, Denizli Province — Turkey. Natural terraces of thermal springs that look like snow. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
